benchmark.description: System-skill benchmark for the gws-gmail-triage Codex skill.

task.prompt: Use the `$gws-gmail-triage` skill. Triage unread Gmail messages in read-only mode by using the underlying gws command with JSON output and a maximum of 5 messages. Return only JSON with top-level keys `messages`, `query`, and `resultSizeEstimate`. Each message entry must include `date`, `from`, `id`, and `subject`.

scenarios.description: Codex mini using the installed gws-gmail-triage system skill through codex exec with full system access.

assertions.value: (() => { const data = JSON.parse(output); if (!Array.isArray(data.messages)) return false; if (typeof data.query !== 'string') return false; if (typeof data.resultSizeEstimate !== 'number') return false; if (data.messages.length > 5) return false; return data.messages.every((message) => ['date', 'from', 'id', 'subject'].every((key) => typeof message[key] === 'string')); })()
